series_metadata.series_description: CONSISTS OF ALL RECORDS WHICH DOCUMENT, OR ARE THE BASIS FOR, PAYROLL INCLUDING TIME REPORTS, ACTIVITY SHEETS, TIME CARDS, OVERTIME/COMPTIME/FLEXTIME AUTHORIZATIONS, LEAVE REQUESTS, and UNION LEAVE. THIS SCHEDULE IS TO BE USED BY ALL DIVISIONS OF THE OHIO DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until associated payroll records are audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retained in HMS until associated payroll records are audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
